scopeContract.rowCoverageRule: Every unit:M30:item-use row and every M29 transfer to M30 must be implemented, mapped-consumed, or transferred exactly once.
scopeContract.itemUseBoundary: M30 owns immediate use items 30/31/38/39/40/41/42/43/52, their success/failure/cancel paths, and the special item 200~214 state classification.
scopeContract.transferBoundary: Items that only gate training availability or visit/event acquisition transfer to their feature owner instead of being treated as item-use effects.
